title: Add learning-loop feature to homepage + docs
description: User-requested scope add: the learning loop is a key new feature and must be on the homepage (roadmaps already are). Add a concise Pillar-2 feature card to cloud/worker/src/landing.ts (Pillar 2 'That orchestrates them') describing the learning loop: every epic ends with a retro that harvests what worked/broke and promotes it into durable memory (.tick/learnings.md, repo docs) read by every future planning pass and implementer — so the orchestration improves over time and mistakes don't repeat. Also add a brief mention to cloud/worker/src/docs-page.ts. Spec: docs/promo-website-orchestration-update-roadmap.md section 4, Pillar 2 card 7. HONESTY: it is a structured retro->promote->reuse loop, NOT model training / black-box learning; no model/tier names; no tk run; cloud opt-in. VERIFY: cd cloud/worker && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit.
acceptance_criteria: landing.ts Pillar-2 grid has a learning-loop card describing retro->promote->reuse into durable memory; docs-page mentions it; honest framing (no model-training claims, no model names); cd cloud/worker && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit clean; no tk run / no invalid commands
closed_reason: Completed: added 'Gets smarter every epic' learning-loop card to landing Pillar-2 + docs-page mention; honest retro->promote->reuse framing, no model-training claim, tsc clean
